nasb.text: “This shall be the sign to you from the Lord, that the Lord will do this thing that He has spoken:

esv.text: “This shall be the sign to you from the Lord, that the Lord will do this thing that he has promised:

cnv.text: 以下就是耶和華給你的兆頭，為要證明耶和華必成全他所說過的。

ccb.text: 以赛亚说：“耶和华要给你一个预兆，以证明祂言出必行。

csbs.text: 以下是我耶和华给你的征兆来证明我耶和华必成就所说的这事：
